array_types.name: Filters_Array
array_types.code: type Filters_Array is array (0 .. 9) of Text_Filter;

documentation.description: Array of up to 10 custom-defined text filters.

access_types.name: Filters_Access
access_types.code: type Filters_Access is access all Filters_Array;

documentation.description: Pointer to an array of pointers to functions.

access_types.name: Text_Filter
access_types.code: type Text_Filter is access function (S : String) return String;

documentation.description: Function that transform a String into another String.
